name: Estes Park Ride-A-Kart
address: 2250 Big Thompson Ave, Estes Park, CO 80517
about: Ride A Kart is a family entertainment center located in Estes Park, Colorado, featuring a state-of-the-art Trackman Golf Simulator. The venue is part of a larger complex that includes go-karts, mini-golf, batting cages, and other attractions. The golf simulator is available year-round, including during the winter months, and can be booked online. It is designed for golfers of all ages and skill levels to practice their game and have fun regardless of weather conditions.
why_golfers_like_it: Open all winter for year-round play
State-of-the-art Trackman technology for accurate data
Over 300 virtual courses and multiple games available
Part of a larger entertainment complex with other activities

food_and_drink.notes: Available as part of the larger entertainment center's offerings, but not specified for the simulator area.
No mention of alcohol service on premises.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor with ball and club tracking capabilities.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own clubs to use the golf simulator.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available on-site as part of the larger entertainment center, but bringing outside food or drinks is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The specific time to play 18 holes is not listed, but it can be booked for hourly rentals.

faq.question: Is the golf simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the simulator is designed for all ages and skill levels, and the venue is a family entertainment center.
